Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: Plaintiff provided the court with a timely proof of service; no further hearing is required. PLAINTIFF VALENTINA CUGNASCA'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
